title: 第 19 課｜拉塞福公式：庫侖力的散射指紋｜Landau–Lifshitz 經典力學
description:
庫侖位能如何決定散射角分布？本課從撞擊參數與雙曲線軌道出發，導出拉塞福微分散射截面，解釋其 sin⁻⁴(χ/2) 角度特徵、吸引與排斥的對稱性，以及如何由測量檢驗平方反比定律。

本影片為《Landau–Lifshitz 經典力學》教學系列第 19 課（繁體中文版）。

title: Lesson 19 | Rutherford's Coulomb Scattering Formula | Landau–Lifshitz
description:
How does the Coulomb potential determine the angular distribution of scattering? Starting from the impact parameter and hyperbolic orbit, this lesson derives Rutherford's differential cross-section, explains its sin⁻⁴(χ/2) signature and attraction-repulsion symmetry, and shows how measurements test the inverse-square law.

Lesson 19 of the Landau–Lifshitz Classical Mechanics teaching series (English edition).
